commit_scope: Fix the home page production build by replacing new plain Link usages with AttributedInternalLink.

commands: cd web && npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false --incremental false
local_validation.summary: The Docker-observed home page type error is fixed: the production web build and the standalone type check both pass after replacing plain Link usages.

ci_validation.details: Pending PR checks for the hotfix.

deploy_validation.details: Pending Hostinger auto-deploy and public SHA validation after merge.

phase_gate.reason: Local build proof is complete; CI and public deploy proof remain pending.

evidence_refs: Hostinger Docker build failed at web/app/page.tsx with `Cannot find name 'Link'` for new home buttons.
The fix preserves attribution by using AttributedInternalLink rather than importing plain next/link.
Local web production build and standalone type check pass after the change.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The home page builds in production while the new invitation buttons still emit attributed internal navigation pings.
